zh.lifeSummary: 當John Swynnerton於大約1208年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾時，他的父親John Swynnerton39歲，母親Petronilla Doreslow34歲。他於大約1229年與Eleanor de Peshale結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1254年在英國斯塔福爾斯恩頓享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯恩頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Swynnerton于大约1208年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾时，他的父亲John Swynnerton39岁，母亲Petronilla Doreslow34岁。他于大约1229年与Eleanor de Peshale结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1254年在英国斯塔福爾斯恩頓享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯恩頓。

nameMeanings.name: Swynnerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Swinnerton
meanings: English: habitational name from Swynnerton in Staffordshire. The etymology of the placename is uncertain. It may derive from Old English swille ‘sloppy mess, swill’ + ford ‘ford’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Alternatively, the first element may be swīn ‘swine, hog’, swān ‘herdsman, peasant’, swan ‘swan’, or sumor ‘summer’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When John Swynnerton was born about 1208, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Swynnerton, was 39 and his mother, Petronilla Doreslow, was 34. He married Eleanor de Peshale about 1229. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1254, in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Swynnerton est né environ 1208, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Swynnerton, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Petronilla Doreslow, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor de Peshale environ 1229. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1254, à Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Swynnerton um 1208 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Swynnerton 39 und seine Mutter Petronilla Doreslow 34. Er hat um 1229 Eleanor de Peshale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1254 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Swynnerton è nato il circa 1208 nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Swynnerton, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Petronilla Doreslow, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor de Peshale circa 1229. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1254, nel Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Swynnertonが約1208年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Swynnertonは39歳，母Petronilla Doreslowは34歳であった。約1229年にEleanor de Peshaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1254年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスウイネルトンで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスウイネルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Swynnerton(이)가 대략 1208년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Swynnerton(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Petronilla Doreslow(은)는 34세였다. 그는 대략 1229년 Eleanor de Peshale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1254년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스윈르턴에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스윈르턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Swynnerton nasceu aproximadamente 1208, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Swynnerton, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Petronilla Doreslow, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor de Peshale aproximadamente 1229. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1254, em Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Swynnerton родился около 1208 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Swynnerton было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Petronilla Doreslow, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Peshale около 1229 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1254 г. в местности свинниртон, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности свинниртон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Swynnerton nació aproximadamente 1208, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Swynnerton, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Petronilla Doreslow, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Eleanor de Peshale aproximadamente 1229. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1254, en Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
